{{Quote|It will be done, Commander.|Vo Lian|<ref name="conquest" />}}
'''Vo Lian''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Warrior caste|warrior]] who served under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tsaak Vootuh]] in the [[26 ABY/Legends|second year]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]] as a [[subaltern]]. Lian accompanied the commander to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], where Vootuh confronted [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Imsatad]] of the [[Peace Brigade]], a collaborationist organization that had attempted to capture [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] present on the [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. It was Lian who, at a signal from Vootuh, killed Imsatad with an [[amphistaff]]. The warrior was then charged with ensuring the security of the jungle moon's [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] perimeter, deploying a [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]], and supervising the landing of the first [[Shaper caste|shaper]] [[damutek]] on the [[Invasion of Yavin 4|newly-conquered]] moon.

==Biography==
The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] Vo Lian was born into [[Domain Lian]] and by [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] had attained the rank of [[subaltern]], serving under [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tsaak Vootuh]] as his [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]]. Vootuh's [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] traveled to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the second year of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong invasion]] in order to seize the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who were rumored to have located their [[Jedi Praxeum|headquarters]] on its surface.<ref name="conquest" />

Arriving in the [[Yavin system/Legends|Yavin system]], however, Vootuh and Lian learned that the [[Peace Brigade]], a collaborationist organization, had already [[Invasion of Yavin 4|attacked]] the Praxeum in order to abduct any Jedi present and hand them to [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]], the military coordinator of the invasion who had promised rewards for captive Jedi. Lian was present on the [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]] of Vootuh's vessel as the leader of the Peace Brigade forces, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Imsatad]], attempted to explain the situation to the commander. Intending to regain some semblance of control over the proceedings, Imsatad offered the Yuuzhan Vong the support of his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] and [[Starship/Legends|vessels]], but the commander had little use for the Brigade. When Vootuh informed Imsatad that the Peace Brigade ships would be destroyed, and ordered the Human to take the Yuuzhan Vong to see [[Tahiri Veila]], the one Jedi who had not escaped capture, Imsatad refused. At a nod from Vootuh, Lian stabbed the collaborator through the back with his [[amphistaff]], killing him.<ref name="conquest" />

Vootuh then ordered Lian to secure the moon and its immediate surroundings, and to supervise the Yuuzhan Vong landing. The lieutenant was also tasked with ensuring that the [[damutek]] which would house the [[Shaper caste|shapers]]—the biological engineers of the Yuuzhan Vong—was swiftly installed on the surface. There, the shapers would be experimenting on any captured Jedi, seeking to discover the science of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and hoping to attempt to bend a Jedi to the will of the Yuuzhan Vong. The warrior had soon fulfilled his superior's commands.<ref name="conquest" />

==Personality and traits==
Vo Lian was an efficient and obedient Yuuzhan Vong warrior. Trusted by his commander and willing to kill at a moment's notice when ordered to do so, Lian was swift and lethal in his dispatch of Imsatad. His duties were not merely confined to killing for Vootuh, however; the warrior was also capable of large scale administration and organization, as demonstrated when he was placed in charge of a number of Yavin 4's security operations, such as its [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] perimeter, and the deployment of its [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]].<ref name="conquest" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vo Lian's appearance in ''Edge of Victory I: Conquest'' is brief, lasting several paragraphs, and he is introduced concurrently with Vootuh, a peripheral Yuuzhan Vong protagonist in the novel. His affiliation with Domain Lian recalls that of [[Deign Lian]], a character from [[Michael A. Stackpole]]'s ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}
